headlines.title: Argentina face action over Falklands banner
headlines.description: Argentina face the prospect of disciplinary action from Fifa after their players celebrate the World Cup semi-final win against England with a banner in support of their country's claims to the Falkland Islands.

headlines.title: British Steel taken into public ownership to protect 'vital' UK supply
headlines.description: The Scunthorpe steelworks has been officially nationalised under new government powers passed this week.

headlines.title: TikTok faces Ofcom investigation over child age checks
headlines.description: It follows a review by the regulator in May that criticised the platform for not being "safe enough" for children.

headlines.title: Protests in Ukraine's cities against Zelensky's removal of defence minister
headlines.description: Ukraine's president has not explained Mykhailo Fedorov's dismissal, which is causing great upset among civil society and the military.

headlines.title: New monkey species with orange lips found 'hiding' in DR Congo forest
headlines.description: Scientists describe "amazing feeling" to look into the face of an animal that so few people knew existed.

headlines.title: Nowak killer's first recorded confession revealed
headlines.description: Vickrum Digwa was recorded in a police van discussing Henry Nowak's murder in Southampton.

headlines.title: US military to start screening for testosterone deficiency, Hegseth says
headlines.description: Hegseth says he is authorising hormone screening to ensure US troops "operate at your absolute best".

headlines.title: Families of 43 victims await verdict in Genoa bridge disaster
headlines.description: A large section of the giant Morandi motorway bridge crumbled and collapsed on to the railway tracks below.

headlines.title: Iran targets military bases as US launches wave of strikes
headlines.description: Explosions were heard across Iran overnight, shortly after neighbouring Gulf states began to report attacks.

headlines.title: Weekend cooldown to mark end of heatwave for some
headlines.description: Temperatures are set to fall by several degrees in some areas, including parts of Scotland, Northern Ireland and northern England.

headlines.title: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
headlines.description: England went 1-0 up against Argentina before slumping to a heartbreaking semi-final defeat. Did boss Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics cost them a place in the World Cup final?

headlines.title: Kane unsure if he will play at next World Cup
headlines.description: Harry Kane says it is "too early" to judge whether he could play on for England until the 2030 World Cup following the painful semi-final defeat by Argentina.

headlines.title: Bellingham slapped Argentina substitute after England exit
headlines.description: Jude Bellingham sparks melee as he slaps Argentina substitute Valentin Barco on the back of the head following England's 2-1 World Cup semi-final defeat.

headlines.title: 'That's why he's the king' - Messi sets up third World Cup final
headlines.description: BBC Sport looks at Lionel Messi's masterclass on the right wing to knock England out of the World Cup.

headlines.title: 'I couldn't leave the house, I worried I'd cheat': The rise of relationship OCD
headlines.description: Relationship OCD is gaining awareness, but limited data means little is known about how common the condition is.

headlines.title: The Odyssey is a 'colossal piece of cinema', critics say in rave reviews
headlines.description: The film, starring Matt Damon and Zendaya, is director Sir Christopher Nolan's first since Oppenheimer.

headlines.title: Can Andy Burnham solve the housing crisis?
headlines.description: BBC Verify has looked at the scale of the housing challenge facing Burnham when he becomes PM.

headlines.title: Celebrity influencers paid up to £1m to advertise deodorant on Instagram
headlines.description: The chief executive of Wild reveals what happens behind the scenes of social media posts.

headlines.title: A Cold War bunker gets a luxury makeover as 'doomsday' condos
headlines.description: A former Canadian government nuclear bomb shelter in rural Nova Scotia may soon be home to the country’s first large-scale luxury survival shelter.

headlines.title: 'I must get out into the free world', dissident who fled China on boat tells BBC
headlines.description: Dong Guangping, who has resettled in Canada, recounts his perilous escape from China to South Korea.

headlines.title: The Papers: 'World Cup dream over' and 'Mahmood for chancellor'
headlines.description: England's World Cup "dream" ends and Andy Burnham is "poised" to make Shabana Mahmood his chancellor - Thursday's papers.

headlines.title: Pakistan resisting UK attempts to deport grooming gang leader
headlines.description: The government of Pakistan says it has "no connection whatsoever" with the case of Shabir Ahmed.

headlines.title: Starmer pledges 'cast-iron support' for Ukraine on final visit as PM
headlines.description: The prime minister will meet Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky in Kyiv later on Thursday.

headlines.title: UK economy returns to growth in May
headlines.description: The modest growth reverses a slight contraction that had been seen the previous month.

headlines.title: Singer Jesy Nelson calls plan to test newborns for deadly muscle condition a 'victory'
headlines.description: All newborn babies are set to have a heel prick test for Spinal Muscular Atrophy (SMA) in England.

headlines.title: Actor Sam Neill died from pneumonia, agent confirms
headlines.description: Neill died in Sydney on Monday, with his family saying his death was 'sudden and unexpected'.

headlines.title: BBC News app
headlines.description: Top stories, breaking news, live reporting, and follow news topics that match your interests

headlines.title: Keir Starmer Says Goodbye
headlines.description: Sir Keir Starmer makes his final PMQs appearance as Prime Minister.

headlines.title: ICE fatally shoot two men in Maine and Texas
headlines.description: Trump tells immigration officers not to pause vehicle stops after the killings

headlines.title: Bellingham slapped Argentina substitute after England exit
headlines.description: Jude Bellingham sparks melee as he slaps Argentina substitute Valentin Barco on the back of the head following England's 2-1 World Cup semi-final defeat.

headlines.title: 'Passive' and 'crumbled' - did Tuchel's defensive tactics cost England?
headlines.description: England went 1-0 up against Argentina before slumping to a heartbreaking semi-final defeat. Did boss Thomas Tuchel's "negative" tactics cost them a place in the World Cup final?

headlines.title: Romero labels Neville 'stupid' over criticism
headlines.description: Argentina defender Cristian Romero says player-turned-pundit Gary Neville was "stupid" to criticise his centre-back partnership with Lisandro Martinez.

headlines.title: Kane unsure if he will play at next World Cup
headlines.description: Harry Kane says it is "too early" to judge whether he could play on for England until the 2030 World Cup following the painful semi-final defeat by Argentina.

headlines.title: Scotland goalkeeper Gordon announces retirement
headlines.description: Goalkeeper Craig Gordon announces his retirement from football, bringing an end to a 25-year playing career.
